ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the workclass of the individual */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the education level of the individual */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the individual */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the relationship status of the individual */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the race of the individual */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sex of the individual */,
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the native country of the individual */,
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the output classification of the individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Annual capital gain of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Annual capital loss of the individual */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Number of hours worked by the individual per week */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the individual (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_native_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("native_country_id") REFERENCES native_countries ("native_country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sexes ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES educations ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_output_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_id") REFERENCES outputs ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_workclass_id FOREIGN KEY ("workclass_id") REFERENCES workclasses ("workclass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass (e.g., Federal-gov, Private) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workclass */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the workclass (e.g., Government, Private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Bachelors, Masters) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of education (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Married-civ-spouse, Divorced) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of marital status (e.g., Married, Divorced) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Transport-moving, Priv-house-serv) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of occupation (e.g., Transportation, Service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status (e.g., Unmarried, Wife) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship status */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of relationship status (e.g., Unmarried, Married) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the race */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of race (e.g., Caucasian, African American) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sexes" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of sex (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "native_countries" (
  "native_country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each native country */,
  "native_country_name" TEXT /* Name of the native country (e.g., United-States, Mexico) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the native country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent of the native country (e.g., North America, South America) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("native_country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output classification */,
  "output_name" TEXT /* Name of the output classification (e.g., Fal, True) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the output classification */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of output classification (e.g., Income, Employment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual being checked */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of data quality check (e.g., completeness, accuracy) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the data quality check (e.g., Pass, Fail) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the check and result */,
  "logged_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the data quality issue (e.g., High, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Admin, Analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that has the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
